ul.li: Idempotency: apply_entry must allow repeated calls.
Commit Barrier: Transactions without JE_COMMIT are discarded.
Atomic Header: Tail only advances after replay is successful.

g.text: Validate magic/checksum from Block 0 of Journal Region
Set scan start to oldest non-checkpointed transaction
Load JournalEntry header + payload from disk at offset
If type == JE_COMMIT, mark seq as durable. Else append to txn entry list.
Iterate cache: For each sequence with JE_COMMIT, call apply_entry() idempotently
Move to next record in circular buffer
Set tail = head, update checksum, and fsync header to Block 0
